---
title: Taller 1 — SIG Visualización
author: Carlos E Aguilar Vargas
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .qmd
      format_name: quarto
      format_version: '1.0'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---
